visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with short brown hair, wearing a white oversized t-shirt and vertical striped pants, stands in a brightly lit indoor living area. He holds a purple mop and moves it energetically toward the camera, smiling and gesturing widely with his hands. A purple mop bucket and product boxes are visible on a small table. (2) The camera focuses on the white circular microfiber mop head as it is held close to the lens. The scene transitions to the mop being pushed down into a purple bucket to spin-dry, followed by a shot of the mop cleaning a light-colored tiled floor. (3) A woman with long dark hair, wearing a grey zip-up hoodie, appears alongside the man. She holds a different, fluffier white mop pad near her face, smiling and pointing at its texture. (4) Close-up shots of a bathroom floor with significant standing water are shown. The mop pad is placed on the water, and it visibly absorbs the liquid. The man reappears, holding the mop handle and pointing at the mop head with a surprised expression. (5) The man and woman stand together, holding multiple white mop pads. The man gestures with his hands to emphasize the number of pads, while the woman nods. They are in the same well-lit indoor setting. (6) The man becomes even more energetic, swinging the mop handle in the air while holding a small colorful polka-dot bag. Graphical overlays of a polka-dot suitcase and a matching helmet appear on the screen as he continues to move and point excitedly.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 沒有錯上班很累. [Variety]: \好神拖xhahababy/. (2) [Subtitle]: 它可以有三種不同的布盤. [Variety]: 極細緻布盤. (3) [Subtitle]: 適合廚房加強清潔. [Variety]: 不容易刮傷. [Variety]: \超快乾/. (4) [Subtitle]: 採用特殊的編織法. [Variety]: 抗油污布盤. (5) [Subtitle]: 吸水量高達8倍. [Variety]: 超吸水布盤. (6) [Subtitle]: 或是浴室中使用. [Variety]: ↑吸水量高達8倍↑. (7) [Subtitle]: 每3-6個月就要換一次. [Variety]: 布盤都有折扣. [Variety]: 還有超值優惠!!. (8) [Subtitle]: 五月份限量組. [Variety]: 賣爆!!!. (9) [Subtitle]: 布盤趁優惠趕快買起來. [Variety]: \布盤趁優惠趕快買起來/. (10) [Slogan]: momo獨家優惠買一送一 活動自即日起~6/25. [Variety]: 買布盤抽行李箱/安全帽!!!.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator, 1 female assistant appearing throughout.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main male character has short brown hair and is wearing a white t-shirt with light-colored vertical striped pants.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An indoor home environment featuring a modern living room with a large TV, light wood-colored cabinets, and a grey sofa. A portion of the video takes place in a clean, grey-tiled bathroom.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-arousal, energetic male voice delivering a fast-paced sales pitch. The background is filled with a high-tempo, bright electronic BGM with a strong, driving beat. (2) A mechanical whirring sound of a mop spinner is introduced, layered over the male narration. The voice pitch rises as he emphasizes the product's name. (3) A female voice enters, maintaining a high pitch and an enthusiastic, friendly tone. The sound of water splashing and liquid absorption is heard clearly in the mix during the bathroom scene. (4) Short 'whoosh' and 'ding' sound effects are used to punctuate visual transitions between different mop pad types. The male narrator returns with even greater vocal intensity and strain, indicating extreme excitement. (5) A rapid dialogue exchange occurs between the male and female speakers, characterized by frequent overlapping and high speech density. The BGM remains constant in the background. (6) The final phase features the male narrator shouting promotional details with peak arousal. A celebratory cartoon sound effect is heard as the video concludes, with the music reaching its loudest point before a hard cut to silence.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Problem -> Product Solution (Multiple Features) -> Limited Offer -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote and sell the Supamop x hahababy collaboration series, specifically highlighting three different types of mop pads (Extremely Fine, Anti-Oil, and Super Absorbent) and current discounts available on momo.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct demonstration of the product, inclusion of brand logos, and explicit mention of purchasing channels and discounts.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-energy, variety-show style editing typical of Taiwanese social media influencers to maintain engagement during a product pitch.
